title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to OpsPal's Windows setup experience with a streamlined installer that handles all required tools automatically. We also enhanced Salesforce RevOps assessments to better identify your organization's revenue fields and sales processes, making audits more accurate and relevant. Additionally, we strengthened security with automated secret scanning and fixed numerous workflow issues to make the platform more reliable.

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of weekly updates
details: OpsPal now automatically generates and publishes weekly release notes so you always know what's new and improved

entries.headline: Salesforce permission workflows run more smoothly
Salesforce operations work more reliably with fewer interruptions
details: Fixed six workflow issues that were blocking legitimate Salesforce tasks from completing successfully

entries.headline: Simple record lookups run faster without extra validation steps
details: Quick queries to check single records or small result sets now skip unnecessary routing checks for better performance

entries.headline: Windows setup now installs all required tools automatically
details: The installer now handles Git, Claude Code, and Node.js installation on Windows without manual steps

entries.headline: Better error reporting when Salesforce connections fail
details: OpsPal now detects and reports Salesforce authentication issues more clearly to help you troubleshoot faster

entries.headline: Windows installer works properly with web-based installation
details: Fixed script compatibility issues that prevented the installer from running correctly when launched from a web browser

entries.headline: Salesforce data queries work properly on production orgs
RevOps assessments now capture revenue context for future reference
Customize templates and galleries while preserving updates
details: You can now personalize OpsPal's templates and brand gallery with custom content that won't be overwritten during platform updates

entries.headline: RevOps assessments automatically find your revenue fields and sales stages
details: OpsPal now detects your organization's specific revenue fields like ARR and ACV, plus identifies your active sales processes for more accurate audit results

entries.headline: Setup process installs all required dependencies automatically
One-click Windows setup with PowerShell installer
Smoother setup experience with better project detection
Prevent problematic Salesforce deployments before they happen
details: New validation tools check for common deployment issues like picklist conflicts and field history limits before you deploy to avoid failures

entries.headline: Automatic secret scanning prevents accidental credential commits
Enhanced security scanning protects your credentials
Improved credential security across the platform
